warriors_strike.name: Warrior's Strike
warriors_strike.description: Setup/Builder: A veteran's calculated strike. Generates 20 Stamina and 1 Combat Pip.

battle_cry.name: Battle Cry
battle_cry.description: Setup: Intimidate the foe with a roar. Generates 1 Combat Pip and applies [Weakened].

brutal_cleave.name: Brutal Cleave
brutal_cleave.description: Payoff/AOE: A wide, horizontal arc. Consumes 5 Combat Pips to deal massive AOE Physical damage.

overpowering_blow.name: Overpowering Blow
overpowering_blow.description: Payoff: A strike designed to shatter guards. Consumes 3 Combat Pips to deal damage and [Stagger].

ignore_pain.name: Ignore Pain
ignore_pain.description: Defense: Push through the suffering. Converts 20% of missing HP into a temporary shield.

berserk_leap.name: Berserk Leap
berserk_leap.description: Defense/Mobility: Leap into the fray, gaining [Unstoppable] for 2 ticks.

war_path.name: War Path
war_path.description: Mobility: Burst of adrenaline to move across the battlefield with ease.

unbreakable_will.name: Unbreakable Will
unbreakable_will.description: Utility/Signature: You cannot be reduced below 1 HP for 5 ticks.

warrior_physiology.name: Warrior Physiology
warrior_physiology.description: Passive: Veteran's Grit. You gain 10% bonus Defense and your Combat Pip generation is doubled when below 50% HP.
